description: RAG retrieval: semantic query (no exact term match) returns correct chunk via vector search.
what_bug_this_catches: Regression where vector retrieval path is bypassed so semantically similar but lexically different queries fail to retrieve correct chunks.

packets.label: Pneumococcal vaccine adults
packets.value: PCV21 is recommended for all adults 65 years or older who have not previously received a pneumococcal conjugate vaccine.

claims.text: CDC-ACIP recommends PCV21 for adults 65 or older not previously vaccinated with a pneumococcal conjugate vaccine.
